channel.title: Dropout Presents
channel.description: Latest releases from Dropout Presents on Dropout.tv

item.title: Dropout Presents Season 2 Trailer
item.description:
Dropout Presents is back! Get ready for all new comedy specials, starting November 2025.

Duration: 01:41

Tags: Dropout Presents, stand up comedy, improv, laughing, demi adejuyigbe, aparna nancherla, mark vigeant, michael cruz kayne, variety show, ted talks, robots, marriage, speeches, relationships, anxiety, funerals, death
